name: recoil_state_confirm_quit_destructor
description: RecoilStateConfirmQuit::~RecoilStateConfirmQuit disables and destroys the active confirm-quit dialog, clears the dialog pointer, and restores the base state vtable.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is accepted by the recoil_state_confirm_quit_destructors VC target.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x415880 validates the confirm-quit vtable install, m_dialog reload, virtual SetEnabled(0), virtual scalar deleting destructor call with flags 1, m_dialog clear, base vtable restore, and SEH cleanup.
The native smoke verifies the dialog path calls SetEnabled(0), calls the dialog scalar deleting destructor with flags 1, clears m_dialog, and restores the base vtable.
The native smoke verifies the null-dialog path still restores the base vtable.
